chart.title: Average Response Time by DNS Server

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20004` | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | timechart avg(avg_time) by dest_ip useother="f"

`netflow_search_rule_20004` | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(bytes_out)` | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes_in sum(bytes_out) as sumbytes_out avg(avg_time) AS AvgTime sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by exp_ip dest_ip _time nfo_hostname | eval avgbits_in= sumbytes_in*8/($span_int$) | eval avgbits_out= sumbytes_out*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes_in) as TrafficAmountIn sum(sumbytes_out) as TrafficAmountOut sum(sumflowcount) as Connections avg(AvgTime) as AvgTime max(avgbits_in) as MaxTrafficIn max(avgbits_out) as MaxTrafficOut by exp_ip dest_ip nfo_hostname | sort - AvgTime | eval AverageSpeedIn=(TrafficAmountIn)*8/$range$ | eval AverageSpeedOut=(TrafficAmountOut)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeedIn=AverageSpeedIn/1000000 | eval TrafficAmountIn=TrafficAmountIn/1024/1024 | eval MaxTrafficIn=MaxTrafficIn/1000000 | eval TrafficSpeedOut=AverageSpeedOut/1000000 | eval TrafficAmountOut=TrafficAmountOut/1024/1024 | eval MaxTrafficOut=MaxTrafficOut/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Average Resp. Time ms, AvgTime, 0)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps received, TrafficSpeedIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB received, TrafficAmountIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps sent, TrafficSpeedOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB sent, TrafficAmountOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps received, MaxTrafficIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps sent, MaxTrafficOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Connections, Connections)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table exp_ip_name dest_ip "Average Resp. Time ms" "Max Mbps received" "Average Mbps received" "Total Traffic MB received" "Max Mbps sent" "Average Mbps sent" "Total Traffic MB sent" "Total Connections" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename dest_ip as "DNS Server"

`netflow_search_rule_20005` | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(flow_count)` | chart sum(flow_count) by src_ip | sort - sum(flow_count) | head 10

`netflow_search_rule_20005` | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(flow_count)` | stats sum(flow_count) AS Connections by exp_ip src_ip nfo_hostname | sort - Connections | head 100 | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `commas_formatting(Total Connections, Connections)` | table exp_ip_name src_ip "Total Connections" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename src_ip as "DNS user"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.
This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10004: DNS Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20004 and nfc_id=20005). This Module is packaged in NFO “Services Monitor” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
